extension.description: Repository containing add-ons from the Easy Tools category
extension.disclaimer: This is an experimental. You use this addon only at your own risk.
extension.news: v0.1.0 (2025-06-25) - Initial and test (my 1st) version of Kodi repository

addon.name: Kindgirls
addon.summary: View photos and videos from http://www.kindgirls.com
addon.description: Kindgirls are Nude girls in erotic photos and videos
addon.disclaimer: This is an experimental mod and may not match the original addon from the original author by its version numbering. You use this addon only at your own risk.
